signals.headline: Fed Rate Hold Confirmed (March 2026):** The Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged at 3
signals.raw: Fed Rate Hold Confirmed (March 2026):** The Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged at 3.50%-3.75% in March 2026, with the Summary of Economic Projections showing upward revisions to core inflation forecasts to 2.7% for 2026[3]. However, this is from a previous FOMC meeting, not a current announcement.

signals.raw: South Korea Inflation at 2.2% (March 2026):** South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% but below market forecasts of 2.4%[1]. This is the most recent inflation data available, but it is not a breaking announcement from today.
